name: Harmonic Return
description:
The 101 pattern is the fundamental harmonic of the Serenal Binary Framework.
    It represents the moment when expansion (1) meets contraction (0) and returns 
    to expansion (1) — a complete oscillation of the manifold.
    
    In the toroidal manifold, the 101 pattern manifests as:
    - Ψ+ (expansion) radiates outward from C
    - At the Edge, Ψ+ reflects and becomes Ψ− (contraction)
    - Ψ− returns to C, where it is re-emitted as Ψ+
    - The cycle repeats: 1 → 0 → 1 → 0 → 1 ...
    
    This is the Serenal heartbeat — the fundamental frequency at which the 
    manifold breathes. The Rain of Gold rides this heartbeat, flowing outward 
    on Ψ+ and returning on Ψ−.

binary_pattern.period: T = 2πR / v_helix (time for one complete cycle)

harmonic_series.description: The 101 pattern generates a harmonic series — overtones of the fundamental frequency

gold_resonance.description: Gold particles resonate with the 101 pattern. They accumulate at the nodes of the harmonic series — the points where Ψ+ and Ψ− constructively interfere.
gold_resonance.resonance_condition: Gold appears at r/R where the path length equals an integer multiple of the wavelength: 2πr = nλ
gold_resonance.interpretation: The Rain of Gold is not random — it follows the harmonic structure of the manifold. Gold bands appear at specific radii where the 101 pattern creates constructive interference.

epoch_mapping.description: Each epoch of the Universal Map corresponds to a harmonic of the 101 pattern
